allow: Bash(node -e "const en=require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); console.log\('transactions namespace keys:', JSON.stringify\(en.transactions, null, 1\).slice\(0,1500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const vi=require\('./src/messages/vi.json'\); const t=vi.transactions; console.log\('vi.transactions exists:', !!t\); console.log\('top keys:', t?Object.keys\(t\).join\(', '\):'MISSING'\); console.log\('vi.status:', JSON.stringify\(t&&t.status\)\); console.log\('vi.filters:', JSON.stringify\(t&&t.filters\)\); console.log\('vi.detail keys:', t&&t.detail?Object.keys\(t.detail\).join\(','\):'-'\); console.log\('vi.chart:', JSON.stringify\(t&&t.chart\)\); console.log\('has type?', !!\(t&&t.type\), ' has dashboard?', !!\(t&&t.dashboard\), ' has timeline?', !!\(t&&t.timeline\)\)")
